# Apps In Toss Community (AITC)

> Community open-source tooling for Apps in Toss mini-app development.

AITC provides developer tools, reference implementations, and infrastructure
that make it easier to build and test mini-apps on the Apps in Toss platform.
All projects are community-maintained and open-source.

## Domains

- Site: https://aitc.dev
- SDK example demo: https://sdk-example.aitc.dev
- DevTools demo: https://devtools.aitc.dev
- Docs: https://docs.aitc.dev
- GitHub org: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community

## Pages

- [한국어 홈 (Korean)](https://aitc.dev/ko/)
- [English home](https://aitc.dev/en/)

## Projects

### devtools (available)
Browser DevTools panel and unplugin that mocks the `@apps-in-toss/web-framework`
SDK so mini-apps can be developed and tested in a regular browser without the
Toss app. Includes hot-reload and API stub controls.
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/devtools
- npm: @ait-co/devtools

### sdk-example (available)
Interactive reference app that exercises every public SDK API. Deployed as a
live web demo so contributors can explore SDK behaviour without a device.
- Site: https://sdk-example.aitc.dev
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/sdk-example

### polyfill (coming soon)
Standard Web API polyfill layer for mini-apps. Lets developers write against
browser-standard APIs while targeting the Apps in Toss runtime.
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/polyfill

### docs (coming soon)
Community-maintained guide and API reference for Apps in Toss mini-app
development.
- Site: https://docs.aitc.dev
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/docs

### console-cli (coming soon)
Headless CLI for the Apps in Toss developer console. Automates app registration,
submission, and release management.
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/console-cli
- npm: @ait-co/console-cli

### oidc-bridge (coming soon)
Bridges Toss login to standard OIDC and Firebase Custom Token, enabling
community apps to use familiar auth infrastructure.
- Site: https://oidc-bridge.aitc.dev
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/oidc-bridge

### oidc-bridge-cloud (coming soon)
Managed cloud deployment of oidc-bridge for teams that prefer a hosted option.

### agent-plugin (coming soon)
Claude Code and OpenAI Codex plugin that orchestrates AITC tools — scaffold,
develop, and deploy mini-apps from a single agent command.
- Repo: https://github.com/apps-in-toss-community/agent-plugin

### metrics-ingest (coming soon)
Lightweight telemetry ingest service for tracking mini-app usage and
performance metrics in community deployments.
